# CJK golden baselines

Generated by `pnpm test:cjk-golden` (`scripts/cjk-golden.mjs`).

- `blink/coverage.png` — Chromium (Blink; covers WebView2 family)
- `webkit/coverage.png` — WebKit when Playwright WebKit is installed

Baselines may be machine-generated; review visually for tofu / ransom-note.
